description: Signed distribution readiness boundary framework. Defines future receipt requirements for signed release. No signing performed. No certificate present. No release certification.

future_receipt_requirements.requires: external CA or organization certificate authority

future_receipt_requirements.description: Code signing toolchain (signtool, codesign, or equivalent)
future_receipt_requirements.requires: CI/CD signing environment with certificate access

future_receipt_requirements.description: Receipt from successful artifact signing run
Receipt from signature verification on signed artifact
Receipt from release pipeline completing successfully
future_receipt_requirements.requires: CI/CD release pipeline + signing + artifact publication
distribution channel (GitHub Releases, PyPI, etc.) + signed artifact
